title: Dragon Dragon Fire Fire Deluxe
description:
RELIVE THE CLASSICS OF OLD...…in this 80s-inspired action platformer! Standing in the tradition of beloved arcade greats, “Dragon Dragon Fire Fire Deluxe” sends you through more than 200 handcrafted stages packed with collectibles and legions of enemies. Armed with your fiery breath, take on the challenge and chase the high score, either solo or together with a friend in local cooperative play.

FEATURES• Several vibrant worlds of colorful, destructible stages. Wreak havoc with your fire breath and scorch both your foes and the levels themselves!

• Full support for 2-player local co-op, either on a shared keyboard or with any combination of controllers and keyboard.

• Worldwide online leaderboards for both Story Mode and Score Attack.

• An original chiptune soundtrack, lovingly crafted in the spirit of 80s arcade classics.

• Steam Achievements
description_short: Play as a fire-breathing dragon in this classic arcade platformer! Blast through destructible stages, incinerate your enemies, and chase the high score, solo or alongside a friend.
